understanding.goal_understanding: Guide the character across the tile grid to reach the goal gem (+) without landing on spikes (u/v), using a limited number of turns/attempts.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose MOVE_LEFT or MOVE_RIGHT (horizontal only); after the horizontal step, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until they land on a solid/support tile (o/m/w or other solids), hit a hazard (u/v, immediate loss), or reach the goal (+, win). CLICK targets a specific breakable block (x) at a given [x,y] and removes it to open or alter fall paths; clicks do not move the player. UNDO reverts the previous action to recover from a bad move or click. Planning relies on using landing previews (left_landing/right_landing and corridor_scan) to pick moves that create useful vertical transitions (passages) while avoiding hazards and managing the turn budget.
